message:
Running command: cat /nc/apps/nc_socgen/scripts/regress_examples.py | head -50
echo "---"
# Check what's in the nc_socgen gen_soc - maybe it has verify functionality
grep -n "verify\|scenario\|runner\|simulate" /nc/apps/nc_socgen/nc_socgen/gen_soc.py 2>/dev/null | head -20
